analysis.summary: Arduino IDE 1.x is a Java-based integrated development environment for programming Arduino microcontrollers. It provides code editing, compilation, and board management capabilities for embedded hardware development.
capabilities: Code editing with syntax highlighting for Arduino sketches (app/src/processing/app/Editor.java)
Sketch compilation and uploading to Arduino boards (app/src/processing/app/Sketch.java)
Board and library management through contribution system (app/src/cc/arduino/contributions/)
Serial monitor for debugging and communication (app/src/processing/app/SerialMonitor.java)
Multi-platform GUI application using Java Swing (app/src/processing/app/Base.java)
Library and core package installation from online repositories (app/src/cc/arduino/contributions/libraries/)
Source code navigation with go-to-line functionality (app/src/cc/arduino/view/GoToLineNumber.java)
integrations: Arduino hardware boards via serial communication (JSSC library)
Online package repositories for libraries and cores
Apple macOS integration (app/lib/apple.jar, app/lib/jtouchbar-1.0.0.jar)
Network discovery services via mDNS (app/lib/jmdns-3.5.5.jar)

technical_facts: Code editing with syntax highlighting for Arduino sketches (app/src/processing/app/Editor.java)
Sketch compilation and uploading to Arduino boards (app/src/processing/app/Sketch.java)
Board and library management through contribution system (app/src/cc/arduino/contributions/)
Serial monitor for debugging and communication (app/src/processing/app/SerialMonitor.java)
Multi-platform GUI application using Java Swing (app/src/processing/app/Base.java)
Library and core package installation from online repositories (app/src/cc/arduino/contributions/libraries/)
Source code navigation with go-to-line functionality (app/src/cc/arduino/view/GoToLineNumber.java)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: multi-threaded with Swing EDT for UI operations and background threads for compilation/upload tasks
dependencies: Apache Commons (codec, compress, exec, httpclient, io, lang3, logging, net)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Multi-platform GUI application using Java Swing (app/src/processing/app/Base.java) orchestrates code editing, compilation, board management, and serial communication workflows with persistent state management
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Arduino sketches have defined syntax, board configurations use structured formats, library metadata follows JSON schema (Jackson 2.9.5), but allows flexible sketch content
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Code editing with syntax highlighting (app/src/processing/app/Editor.java), sketch compilation (app/src/processing/app/Sketch.java), library management (app/src/cc/arduino/contributions/libraries/), basic file operations without complex algorithms
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Multi-threaded with Swing EDT for UI operations and background threads for compilation/upload tasks - typical desktop application concurrency without strict consistency needs
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High reusability due to generic IDE components (syntax highlighting, file management, project structure), serial communication abstraction, and plugin architecture. Domain-specific elements limited to Arduino compilation toolchain.

evidence_claims.claim: Java-based desktop application with Swing GUI
evidence_claims.evidence: Multi-platform GUI application using Java Swing (app/src/processing/app/Base.java)
Board and library management through contribution system (app/src/cc/arduino/contributions/)

information_gaps: Network protocol specifications for board discovery
Build system configuration details beyond Ant

analysis.summary: A Ruby on Rails web application for food gardeners to track planting, growing, and harvesting activities with crowdsourced data aggregation and open data API access.
capabilities: Tracks gardening activities including plantings, harvests, and garden management (app/controllers/activities_controller.rb, app/controllers/plantings_controller.rb, app/controllers/harvests_controller.rb)
Manages crop database with approval workflow and Wikipedia integration (app/models/crop.rb, app/controllers/crops_controller.rb)
Provides photo management with Flickr integration (app/controllers/photos_controller.rb, flickraw gem)
Implements member authentication and authorization with role-based permissions (app/controllers/application_controller.rb, cancancan gem)
Offers REST API for accessing gardening data (config/routes.rb API routes, jsonapi-resources gem)
Supports full-text search functionality via Elasticsearch (elasticsearch configuration in docker-compose.yml)
Generates CSV exports of gardening data (app/controllers/data_controller.rb)
Manages garden locations and mapping features (app/controllers/gardens_controller.rb)
Implements seed trading and sharing system (app/controllers/seeds_controller.rb)
integrations: Flickr API for photo management (flickraw gem)
Wikipedia for crop information (en_wikipedia_url in API spec)
Elasticsearch for search functionality (docker-compose.yml configuration)

api_endpoints.summary: List crops with filtering and pagination (swagger/v1/swagger.json)

technical_facts: Tracks gardening activities including plantings, harvests, and garden management (app/controllers/activities_controller.rb, app/controllers/plantings_controller.rb, app/controllers/harvests_controller.rb)
Manages crop database with approval workflow and Wikipedia integration (app/models/crop.rb, app/controllers/crops_controller.rb)
Provides photo management with Flickr integration (app/controllers/photos_controller.rb, flickraw gem)
Implements member authentication and authorization with role-based permissions (app/controllers/application_controller.rb, cancancan gem)
Offers REST API for accessing gardening data (config/routes.rb API routes, jsonapi-resources gem)
Supports full-text search functionality via Elasticsearch (elasticsearch configuration in docker-compose.yml)
Generates CSV exports of gardening data (app/controllers/data_controller.rb)
Manages garden locations and mapping features (app/controllers/gardens_controller.rb)
Implements seed trading and sharing system (app/controllers/seeds_controller.rb)

architecture_patterns: Concurrency: sync with Puma web server (config/puma.rb referenced in Procfile)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Tracks gardening activities including plantings, harvests, and garden management (app/controllers/activities_controller.rb, app/controllers/plantings_controller.rb, app/controllers/harvests_controller.rb) + Generates CSV exports of gardening data (app/controllers/data_controller.rb) + crowdsourced data aggregation from summary
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: JSONAPI specification compliance (jsonapi-resources gem) + PostgreSQL 17 (docker-compose.yml) + Swagger/OpenAPI documentation (rswag gems)
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Rails MVC pattern with controllers for activities, plantings, harvests, crops, gardens, seeds (app/controllers/) + PostgreSQL database operations + REST API endpoints
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: PostgreSQL 17 (docker-compose.yml) as primary database + Rails ActiveRecord ORM patterns
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High reusability due to generic data aggregation patterns, CRUD operations, REST API structure, and standard Rails architecture. Domain-specific elements (gardening) are primarily in data models and UI, not core logic.

evidence_claims.claim: Implements REST API with JSONAPI compliance

required_fields: JSONAPI compliant structure based on jsonapi-resources gem

analysis.summary: DEM (Development Environment Manager) is a CLI tool that creates and manages containerized development environments for embedded software development, where each tool runs in its own isolated container while allowing users to work on their host system.
capabilities: Creates and manages containerized development environments with isolated tools (dem/core/dev_env.py)
Installs development environments from remote catalogs (dem/core/commands/install_cmd.py)
Manages development environment configurations and tool assignments (dem/core/commands/assign_cmd.py, dem/core/commands/modify_cmd.py)
Executes tasks within containerized development environments (dem/core/commands/run_cmd.py)
Manages container registries and hosts for tool distribution (dem/core/registry.py, dem/core/hosts.py)
Exports and imports development environment configurations (dem/core/commands/export_cmd.py, dem/core/commands/import_cmd.py)
Provides TUI interface for development environment management (dem/cli/tui/)
Serves REST API for programmatic access to development environment operations (dem/api/main.py)
integrations: Docker container runtime for tool isolation (docker.errors handling in dem/__main__.py)
Container registries for tool image distribution (dem/core/registry.py)
Remote catalogs for development environment templates (dem/core/dev_env_catalog.py)

api_endpoints.summary: Execute a task in a development environment (dem/api/main.py:43)

technical_facts: Creates and manages containerized development environments with isolated tools (dem/core/dev_env.py)
Installs development environments from remote catalogs (dem/core/commands/install_cmd.py)
Manages development environment configurations and tool assignments (dem/core/commands/assign_cmd.py, dem/core/commands/modify_cmd.py)
Executes tasks within containerized development environments (dem/core/commands/run_cmd.py)
Manages container registries and hosts for tool distribution (dem/core/registry.py, dem/core/hosts.py)
Exports and imports development environment configurations (dem/core/commands/export_cmd.py, dem/core/commands/import_cmd.py)
Provides TUI interface for development environment management (dem/cli/tui/)
Serves REST API for programmatic access to development environment operations (dem/api/main.py)

architecture_patterns: CLI tool with embedded API server
Concurrency: sync with FastAPI async capabilities for API server

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Creates and manages containerized development environments with isolated tools (dem/core/dev_env.py), Manages development environment configurations and tool assignments (dem/core/commands/assign_cmd.py, dem/core/commands/modify_cmd.py), Manages container registries and hosts for tool distribution (dem/core/registry.py, dem/core/hosts.py)
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Pydantic data validation (dem/api/main.py), FastAPI (dem/api/main.py imports) with structured endpoints, configuration management through CLI commands
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Installs development environments from remote catalogs (dem/core/commands/install_cmd.py), Exports and imports development environment configurations (dem/core/commands/export_cmd.py, dem/core/commands/import_cmd.py), configuration management operations
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: CLI tool with embedded API server, sync with FastAPI async capabilities for API server, no evidence of distributed state or transaction requirements
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to generic orchestration pattern - container lifecycle management, configuration handling, and CLI/API interface patterns are broadly applicable to many domains requiring resource orchestration

evidence_claims.claim: System manages containerized environments with state persistence
evidence_claims.evidence: Creates and manages containerized development environments with isolated tools (dem/core/dev_env.py), Manages development environment configurations and tool assignments (dem/core/commands/assign_cmd.py, dem/core/commands/modify_cmd.py)

evidence_claims.claim: Supports both CLI and REST API interfaces
evidence_claims.evidence: Typer CLI framework (dem/cli/main.py), Serves REST API for programmatic access to development environment operations (dem/api/main.py)
Docker container engine (docker.errors imports in __main__.py), Docker container runtime for tool isolation (docker.errors handling in dem/__main__.py)
